basics.name: Abdul Aziz Zailani
basics.label: Senior SRE & DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Senior SRE & DevOps Engineer with 6+ years of expertise in multi-cloud infrastructure, high-availability container orchestration (EKS/GKE), and advanced platform observability. Proven track record in designing auto-scaling runner fleets, enterprise CI/CD pipeline engines, and custom quality gate integrations. Focused on system reliability, distributed tracing, and developer velocity.

work.summary: Managed the reliability, high availability, and cost efficiency of multi-cloud infrastructure (AWS & GCP) hosting core logistics microservices. Led large-scale cloud migrations, architected automated runner fleets, and standardized continuous delivery platforms to guarantee platform uptime and optimize developer productivity.
highlights: Zero-Downtime Cloud Migration: Led and successfully executed the end-to-end migration of 100% of core production microservices and databases from GCP to AWS with 0% downtime (zero service interruption).

GitHub Actions Scale Sets (ARC): Architected and deployed GitHub Actions Runner Controller (ARC) on AWS EKS to manage auto-scaling self-hosted runner fleets, reducing pipeline build wait times by 40% and optimizing runner cost efficiency by 30%.

Jenkins-as-Code (JCasC): Standardized CI/CD pipelines utilizing JCasC configurations, improving pipeline deployment speed by 25% and integrating automated Lighthouse performance quality gates directly into the runner runtime.

Distributed Observability: Deployed Grafana Tempo distributed tracing stack with AWS S3 storage backend across all environments, reducing Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) by 50% for production incidents.

work.summary: Directed GitOps adoption, mobile application deployment workflows, and secure multi-cloud architectures. Managed relational/NoSQL databases and messaging brokers while driving platform observability and technical strategy across the SRE team.
highlights: ArgoCD GitOps Adoption: Led the adoption of GitOps practices using ArgoCD, improving configuration synchronization speed by 35% and eliminating deployment drift across dev, staging, and production environments.
Mobile CI/CD with Fastlane: Built automated CI/CD pipelines for Android/iOS apps utilizing Fastlane, cutting mobile release cycle times by 50% and integrating automated QA testing.
Secure Alibaba Cloud VPC: Designed a secure VPC and corporate network architecture on Alibaba Cloud with Pritunl VPN integrations, securing internal platform communication for 50+ active engineers.
Platform Observability Stack: Revamped cluster-wide monitoring using Prometheus, Grafana, and New Relic, increasing proactive incident detection rates by 40%.

work.summary: Orchestrated container workloads, continuous integration engines, and centralized logging stacks. Spearheaded cloud migrations and infrastructure performance tuning to optimize costs and availability.
highlights: AWS Cloud Migration: Led the successful migration of legacy on-premise infrastructure to AWS, improving application response times by 30% while maintaining 99.9% system availability during the transition.
Container Orchestration: Containerized and orchestrated 30+ core microservices using Docker Swarm and Kubernetes, improving overall cluster resource utilization by 25%.
CI/CD Optimization: Revamped Jenkins and GitLab CI pipelines, reducing software release deployment cycles by 70% (accelerating releases from weekly to daily deployments).
Observability Setup: Deployed centralized logging and APM monitoring via ELK Stack and New Relic, improving system diagnostics speed by 45%.

work.summary: Administered corporate networks, Linux/Windows servers, user credentials, and security policies. Established initial systems monitoring and detailed technical documentation.
highlights: Infrastructure Availability: Maintained 99.95% service uptime across Linux and Windows Server environments, managing firewalls, backups, and user access.
Proactive System Monitoring: Built and configured early-stage server monitoring utilizing Grafana and ELK Stack, reducing hardware incident resolution times by 30%.
Technical Documentation: Authored and updated 50+ technical SOPs and infrastructure topologies, reducing new SRE/IT member onboarding times by 40%.

work.summary: Designed, migrated, and deployed scalable database nodes and high-availability application environments on modern cloud infrastructures.
highlights: Cloud to Cloud Migration: Spearheaded the seamless migration of application nodes and MySQL databases from DigitalOcean to AWS, boosting overall database query speeds by 35%.
AWS Elastic Beanstalk: Deployed and scaled high-availability application workloads on AWS Elastic Beanstalk, improving overall service availability by 20% under peak user traffic.
